mapper.select: SELECT COMPANY, EMP_CODE, YYYYMMDD, DEPT_CODE, SHIFT_CODE, ACTUAL_SHIFT_CODE AS actualShiftCode, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CHECK_IN, 108), 5) AS checkIn, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CHECK_OUT, 108), 5) AS checkOut, WORK_MIN AS workMin, OVERNIGHT_YN AS overnightYn, LATE_YN AS lateYn, LATE_MIN AS lateMin FROM HRTDAILYATTENDANCE01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND YYYYMMDD BETWEEN #{startYmd} AND #{endYmd} ORDER BY YYYYMMDD
mapper.update: MERGE HRTDAILYATTENDANCE01 AS T USING (VALUES (#{company}, #{empCode}, #{yyyymmdd})) AS S(COMPANY, EMP_CODE, YYYYMMDD) ON T.COMPANY = S.COMPANY AND T.EMP_CODE = S.EMP_CODE AND T.YYYYMMDD = S.YYYYMMDD WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET DEPT_CODE = #{deptCode}, SHIFT_CODE = #{shiftCode}, CHECK_IN = #{checkIn}, CHECK_OUT = #{checkOut}, WORK_MIN = #{workMin}, OVERNIGHT_YN = #{overnightYn}, LATE_YN = #{lateYn}, LATE_MIN = #{lateMin}, UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (COMPANY, EMP_CODE, YYYYMMDD, DEPT_CODE, SHIFT_CODE, CHECK_IN, CHECK_OUT, WORK_MIN, OVERNIGHT_YN, LATE_YN, LATE_MIN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{company}, #{empCode}, #{yyyymmdd}, #{deptCode}, #{shiftCode}, #{checkIn}, #{checkOut}, #{workMin}, #{overnightYn}, #{lateYn}, #{lateMin}, GETDATE(), GETDATE());
mapper.select: SELECT COMPANY, EMP_CODE, YYYYMMDD, DEPT_CODE, SHIFT_CODE, ACTUAL_SHIFT_CODE AS actualShiftCode, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CHECK_IN, 108), 5) AS checkIn, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CHECK_OUT, 108), 5) AS checkOut, WORK_MIN AS workMin, OVERNIGHT_YN AS overnightYn, LATE_YN AS lateYn, LATE_MIN AS lateMin FROM HRTDAILYATTENDANCE01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND YYYYMMDD = #{yyyymmdd}

SELECT ISNULL(COALESCE(NULLIF(os.SHIFT_CODE, ''), s.SHIFT_CODE), '') AS shiftCode, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), COALESCE(os.WORK_ON_HHMM, s.WORK_ON_HHMM), 108) AS workOnHhmm, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), COALESCE(os.WORK_OFF_HHMM, s.WORK_OFF_HHMM), 108) AS workOffHhmm, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), COALESCE(os.BREAK1_START_HHMM, s.BREAK1_START_HHMM), 108) AS break1StartHhmm, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), COALESCE(os.BREAK1_END_HHMM, s.BREAK1_END_HHMM), 108) AS break1EndHhmm, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), COALESCE(os.BREAK2_START_HHMM, s.BREAK2_START_HHMM), 108) AS break2StartHhmm, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), COALESCE(os.BREAK2_END_HHMM, s.BREAK2_END_HHMM), 108) AS break2EndHhmm, CASE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) WHEN 'WEEKDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'ANYDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'WEEKEND' THEN 'OFF' ELSE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) END AS workDayType FROM HRIDEPTTRANSFER01 tr JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 dept ON dept.COMPANY = #{company} AND dept.DEPT_CODE = tr.DEPT_CODE JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 pm ON pm.COMPANY = dept.COMPANY AND pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = dept.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pm.USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 pd ON pd.COMPANY = pm.COMPANY AND pd.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pd.SEQ = ( (DATEDIFF(DAY, pm.START_DATE, CAST(#{yyyymmdd} AS DATE)) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + pm.CYCLE_COUNT) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + 1 ) JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON s.COMPANY = pd.COMPANY AND s.SHIFT_CODE = pd.SHIFT_CODE OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP 1 o.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 o ON r.COMPANY = o.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = o.REQ_ID WHERE r.COMPANY = #{company} AND r.TARGET_EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND r.REQ_GROUP = 'OTHER' AND r.STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND CAST(#{yyyymmdd} AS DATE) BETWEEN o.START_DATE AND o.END_DATE ORDER BY r.REQ_ID DESC ) oReq LEFT JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 os ON os.COMPANY = #{company} AND os.SHIFT_CODE = oReq.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE WHERE tr.COMPANY = #{company} AND tr.EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND tr.START_DATE <= CAST(#{yyyymmdd} AS DATE) AND (tr.END_DATE IS NULL OR tr.END_DATE >= CAST(#{yyyymmdd} AS DATE))

SELECT r.REQ_TYPE AS reqType, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.START_TIME, 108), 5) AS startTime, ISNULL(g.START_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') AS startTimeType, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.END_TIME, 108), 5) AS endTime, ISNULL(g.END_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') AS endTimeType FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 g ON r.COMPANY = g.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = g.REQ_ID WHERE r.COMPANY = #{company} AND r.TARGET_EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND r.TARGET_DATE = CAST(#{yyyymmdd} AS DATE) AND r.STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND r.REQ_GROUP = 'GENERAL' AND r.REQ_TYPE IN ('연장', '조출연장', '휴일근무', '조퇴')

SELECT h.EMP_CODE AS empCode, h.EMP_NAME AS empName, d.DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, d.DEPT_NAME AS deptName FROM HRIMASTER01 h JOIN HRIDEPTTRANSFER01 tr ON tr.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND tr.EMP_CODE = h.EMP_CODE AND tr.START_DATE <= CAST(#{today} AS DATE) AND (tr.END_DATE IS NULL OR tr.END_DATE >= CAST(#{today} AS DATE)) JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 d ON d.COMPANY = tr.COMPANY AND d.DEPT_CODE = tr.DEPT_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTDAILYATTENDANCE01 rec ON rec.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND rec.EMP_CODE = h.EMP_CODE AND rec.YYYYMMDD = #{today} WHERE h.COMPANY = #{company} AND (h.RETIRE_DATE IS NULL OR h.RETIRE_DATE > CAST(#{today} AS DATE)) AND tr.DEPT_CODE IN #{code} AND (rec.YYYYMMDD IS NULL OR rec.CHECK_IN IS NULL) ORDER BY d.DEPT_CODE, h.EMP_CODE
